query: ("weather forecast" OR "meteorological forecast" OR "heat forecast" OR "temperature forecast" OR "early warning system" OR "heat warning" OR "heat alert" OR "weather advisory" OR "climate forecast" OR "extreme heat forecast") AND ("cooling center" OR "cooling centre" OR "heat refuge" OR "cooling shelter" OR "air conditioning" OR "climate shelter" OR "emergency shelter" OR "community cooling" OR "public cooling" OR "heat relief center" OR "temperature health" OR "temperature mortality" OR "heat health" OR "heat mortality" OR "heat adaptation" OR "heat protection") AND ("randomized controlled trial" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "instrumental variable" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "causal inference" OR "intervention study" OR "impact evaluation" OR "policy evaluation" OR "propensity score" OR "matching estimator" OR randomized OR causal)
